Description:
Clicking the dropdown arrow does not expand the sorting menu; 
only clicking the text works.
Preconditions: User is logged in and landing page with sorting field is displayed.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Hover over sort dropdown icon
2. Click the arrow icon
3. Observe behavior
Actual Result:
Dropdown does not expand when arrow 
icon is clicked.
Expected Result: Both arrow icon and text should trigger the dropdown menu.

Description: Privacy Policy link in footer does not redirect to any page.
Preconditions: User is on landing page and footer is visible.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Scroll to footer
2. Click 'Privacy Policy' link
Expected Result: User should be redirected to Privacy Policy page.

Summary: Unable to add multiple quantities of the same item
Description: Cart quantity field is non-editable and user cannot increase item quantity.
Preconditions: User is logged in and product is available.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Add product to cart
2. Navigate to cart
3. Try increasing quantity
Actual Result: Quantity cannot be edited or increased.
Expected Result: User should be able to modify quantity from cart or product page.

Summary: Missing pointer cursor on clickable elements
Description: Clickable elements do not show pointer cursor on hover.
Preconditions: User is on product listing page.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Hover over product name
2. Hover over product image
Actual Result: Cursor remains default instead of pointer.
Expected Result: Clickable elements should display pointer cursor.

Summary: Button state inconsistency after Reset App State
Description: After resetting app state, cart clears but buttons remain in 'Remove' state.
Preconditions: Product added to cart and Reset App State is used.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Add product to cart
2. Use Reset App State
3. Return to product page
Expected Result: Buttons should revert to 'Add to cart'.

Description: User can complete checkout even when cart is empty after Reset App State.
Preconditions: Checkout process started and Reset App State used.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Add product to cart
2. Start checkout
3. Use Reset App State
4. Continue checkout
Expected Result: System should prevent completing checkout with empty cart.
